$comment: Team-shared Claude Code settings for openclaw-nodedev. Personal overrides go in settings.local.json. The scope-check hook enforces MASTER_PLAN §6.2 — every Edit/Write/MultiEdit/NotebookEdit is gated by the active plan scopes (memory-plan/plans/*/SCOPE.md, open ```files blocks only). See memory-plan/canonical/MASTER_PLAN.md for the discipline; .claude/hooks/scope-check.sh for the implementation.
